## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests or documented why they are not applicable.
- [ ] I updated documentation for behavior, setup, API, schema, policy, or operational changes.
- [ ] I removed secrets, real customer data, private logs, and unrelated artifacts.

## Security impact

- [ ] This change does not affect security-sensitive behavior.
- [ ] This change affects security-sensitive behavior and includes threat model notes, evidence requirements, audit fields, and rollback considerations.

## Related issues

Link related issues, design notes, or findings.
